metadata.title: Completr
metadata.description: This plugin provides advanced auto-completion functionality for LaTeX, Frontmatter and standard writing.

regex.source: Notice("Failed to parse latex commands file " + path + ". Using default commands.", 3e3)
regex.target: Notice("无法解析latex命令文件 " + path + ". 使用默认命令.", 3e3)
Notice(`${e.message}. 使用默认的提示类型.`, 3e3)

regex.source: Notice("Unable to import " + file.name + " because it already exists!")
regex.target: Notice("无法导入 " + file.name + " 因为它已经存在!")

regex.source: .log(this.getCharsetName() + " prober hit error at byte " + i + "\n")
regex.target: .log(this.getCharsetName() + " 探测器在字节 " + i + " 处出错\n")

regex.source: .log(this._mModel.charsetName + " confidence = " + cf + ", we have a winner\n")
regex.target: .log(this._mModel.charsetName + " 置信度 = " + cf + ", 我们有一个赢家\n")

regex.source: .log(this._mModel.charsetName + " confidence = " + cf + ", below negative shortcut threshhold " + NEGATIVE_SHORTCUT_THRESHOLD + "\n")
regex.target: .log(this._mModel.charsetName + " 置信度 = " + cf + ", 低于负快捷阈值 " + NEGATIVE_SHORTCUT_THRESHOLD + "\n")

regex.source: .log("Completr: No colors left for snippet, using random color")
regex.target: .log("Completr: 剩余颜色不足以用于代码片段，使用随机颜色")
.log("Completr 提示类型解析错误:", e.message)

regex.source: .log("Completr: Please enable Live Preview mode to use snippets")
regex.target: .log("Completr: 请启用实时预览模式以使用代码片段")

regex.source: .log("Completr: Without Live Preview enabled, most features of Completr will not work properly!")
regex.target: .log("Completr: 如果未启用实时预览，Completr的大多数功能将无法正常工作!")

regex.source: name: "Bypass the popup and press Enter"
name: "Bypass the popup and press Tab"
name: "Add the currently selected word to the blacklist"
regex.target: name: "将当前选定的单词添加到黑名单"
name: "跳到下一个代码片段占位符"

regex.source: .setDesc("A regular expression which matches a character of a word. Used by during completion to find the word to the left of the cursor and used by the file scanner to find valid words.")
regex.target: .setDesc("一个匹配单词字符的正则表达式。在补全时用于查找光标左侧的单词，文件扫描器用于查找有效单词。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Whether the popup is automatically focused once it opens.")
.setDesc("Whether the popup opens automatically when typing.")
.setDesc("The minimum length a word has to be, to count as a valid suggestion. This value is used by the file scanner and word list provider.")
regex.target: .setDesc("单词必须达到的最小长度才能算作有效建议。该值由文件扫描器和单词列表提供者使用。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The minimum length a word has to be, to trigger suggestions. The LaTeX provider has its own separate setting.")
regex.target: .setDesc("单词必须达到的最小长度才能触发建议。LaTeX 提供者有自己单独的设置。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The insertion mode that is used. Ignore-case would suggest 'Hello' if the typed text is 'hello', match-case would not. Append would complete 'Hell' with 'Hello' while replace would complete it with 'hello' instead (if only 'hello' was a known word). Only used by the file scanner and word list provider.")
regex.target: .setDesc("使用的插入模式。如果是忽略大小写，则输入 'hello' 会建议 'Hello'，匹配大小写则不会。追加模式会将 'Hell' 补全为 'Hello'，而替换模式则会补全为 'hello'（如果 'hello' 是已知单词）。仅由文件扫描器和单词列表提供者使用。")

regex.source: .setDesc("When enabled, the query 'Hello' can suggest 'H\xE8ll\xF2', meaning diacritics will be ignored when filtering the suggestions. Only used by the file scanner and word list provider.")
regex.target: .setDesc("启用时，查询 'Hello' 可以建议 'H\xE8ll\xF2'，这意味着过滤建议时将忽略变音符号。仅由文件扫描器和单词列表提供者使用。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Whether the LaTeX provider should trigger after dollar signs which are enclosed in code blocks (for example ```$\\fr```).")
regex.target: .setDesc("LaTeX 提供者是否应在被包含在代码块中的美元符号后触发（例如 ```$\\fr``）。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Whether the LaTeX provider should ignore the casing of the typed text. If so, the input 'MaThbb' could suggest 'mathbb'.")
regex.target: .setDesc("LaTeX 提供者是否应忽略输入文本的大小写。如果是，输入 'MaThbb' 可能会建议 'mathbb'。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The minimum length a query has to be, to trigger suggestions.")
regex.target: .setDesc("查询必须达到的最小长度才能触发建议。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Whether the Front matter provider should ignore the casing of the typed text. If so, the input 'MaThbb' could suggest 'mathbb'.")
regex.target: .setDesc("前置信息提供者是否应忽略输入文本的大小写。如果是，输入 'MaThbb' 可能会建议 'mathbb'。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Whether each completed tag should be suffixed with a comma or a newline (when typing in a multi-line list). Allows faster insertion of multiple tags.")
regex.target: .setDesc("每个已完成的标签是否应以逗号或换行符为后缀（在多行列表中输入时）。允许更快地插入多个标签。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If this setting is enabled, the currently opened file will be scanned to find new words.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用此设置，当前打开的文件将被扫描以查找新单词。")

regex.source: .setDesc("A list of files which contain words to be used as suggestions. Each word should be on its own line.")
regex.target: .setDesc("包含用于建议的单词的文件列表。每个单词应在单独的一行上。")

regex.source: .setTooltip("Immediately scan all .md files currently in your vault.")
regex.target: .setTooltip("立即扫描当前保险库中的所有 .md 文件。")

regex.source: Error("Display name cannot contain a newline: " + invalidCommand.displayName);
regex.target: Error("显示名称不能包含换行符: " + invalidCommand.displayName);

regex.source: Error("Display name cannot contain a newline: " + invalidsuggestion.displayName);
regex.target: Error("显示名称不能包含换行符: " + invalidsuggestion.displayName);

regex.source: Error(`Invalid suggestions file ${file}: JSON root must be array.`);
regex.target: Error(`无效的建议文件 ${file}:JSON 根必须是数组。`);

regex.source: Whether or not the latex provider is enabled
Whether the front matter provider is enabled
regex.target: 是否启用前置数据提供者

regex.source: Whether or not the file scanner provider is enabled.
regex.target: 是否启用文件扫描提供者。

regex.source: Whether or not the word list provider is enabled
regex.target: 是否启用词汇列表提供者

regex.source: Whether or not the callout provider is enabled
Depending on the size of your vault and computer, this may take a while.
regex.target: 根据你的存储库和计算机的大小，这可能需要一段时间。

regex.source: This will delete all words that have been scanned. No suggestions from this provider will show up anymore until new files are scanned.
regex.target: 这将删除所有已扫描的词汇。此提供者将不再显示任何建议，直到扫描新文件。

regex.source: The file will be removed and the words inside of it won't show up as suggestions anymore.
regex.target: 该文件将被移除，里面的词汇将不再显示为建议。
